DataCalcInsightTemplate.description: The average number of times a Customer makes a purchase, in the current Year
DataCalcInsightTemplate.expression: SELECT UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c as unifiedindividualid__c, SUM(SUBQ1.order_count__c) as count_orders_placed__c, MAX(SUBQ2.unique_customers_count__c) as count_unique_customers__c, ( SUM(SUBQ1.order_count__c)/MAX(SUBQ2.unique_customers_count__c) ) as APF__c FROM UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm JOIN ( SELECT UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c as customer_id__c, year(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__OrderStartDate__c) order_year__c, COUNT(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__Id__c) as order_count__c FROM ssot__SalesOrder__dlm JOIN UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm ON UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__SoldToCustomerId__c GROUP BY UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c, year(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__OrderStartDate__c) ) SUBQ1 ON UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c = SUBQ1.customer_id__c JOIN ( SELECT year(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__OrderStartDate__c) order_year__c, COUNT(UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c) unique_customers_count__c FROM ssot__SalesOrder__dlm JOIN UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm ON UnifiedLinkssotIndividualReal__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__SoldToCustomerId__c GROUP BY year(ssot__SalesOrder__dlm.ssot__OrderStartDate__c) ) SUBQ2 ON SUBQ1.order_year__c = SUBQ2.order_year__c AND SUBQ1.order_year__c = year(CURRENT_DATE()) GROUP BY unifiedindividualid__c
